pr_title: fix: remove doubled user prompt in identify_potential_levers (B1)
pr_description: `chat_message_list` was initialized with `[SYSTEM, USER(user_prompt)]`, then the loop appended `USER(user_prompt)` again on the first iteration This produced a `SYSTEM → USER → USER` sequence on every first LLM call, affecting every run, every model, and every plan Removes the initial `USER` message from initialization so all three turns are handled uniformly by the loop Conversation sequence after fix: ``` SYSTEM → USER(prompt) → ASSISTANT → USER("more") → ASSISTANT → USER("more") ```
